allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const content = fs.readFileSync\('c:/Projects/grace-in-the-margins/src/_data/readingPaths.js', 'utf8'\); const lines = content.split\('\\n'\); for\(let i=40; i<=46; i++\) { const line = lines[i]; let hex = ''; for\(let j=0; j<line.length; j++\) hex += line.charCodeAt\(j\).toString\(16\).padStart\(4,'0'\) + ' '; console.log\('Line ' + \(i+1\) + ': ' + JSON.stringify\(line\)\); console.log\('  Hex: ' + hex\); }")
